storyHook: 描述故障，按指导操作，问题解决

narrative.when: 周四上午，电脑突然打不开文件
narrative.who: 甲（求助的人）· 乙（技术支持人员，电话里指导）
narrative.how: 打电话描述问题，按对方指示一步步操作
narrative.method: 说明故障、按指导重启检查、确认问题解决、表示感谢
narrative.event: 甲下午要交一份重要文件，电脑却出了问题

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My machine is giving me trouble.
turns.zh: 我的机器出问题了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the trouble?
turns.zh: 什么问题？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a paper I need this afternoon, but it will not open.
turns.zh: 我有个下午要用的文件，打不开。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What error do you see?
turns.zh: 你看到什么错误提示？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A box says 'not able to get to this thing'.
turns.zh: 弹窗说‘无法访问该东西’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is the record on your machine or the net?
turns.zh: 记录在你的机器上还是网络上？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is on my machine, in my work box.
turns.zh: 在电脑上，我的工作文件夹里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, let us start again first.
turns.zh: 好，我们先重新开始一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will that make it worse?
turns.zh: 会不会更糟？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, it is a safe step. It will not damage the paper.
turns.zh: 不会，这是安全步骤，不会损坏文件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will do it. Give me a second.
turns.zh: 好的，我重启。稍等一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. Say when it is back.
turns.zh: 别急。好了告诉我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is on now. What now?
turns.zh: 开机了。然后呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go to your work box and open the paper again.
turns.zh: 去你的工作文件夹，再打开文件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Still no. Same error box.
turns.zh: 还是不行。同样的报错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, let us look at the list of running works.
turns.zh: 好，我们看看正在运行的程序列表。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How do I see that?
turns.zh: 怎么看？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put your fingers on control, other, and cut keys all at the same time.
turns.zh: 同时按控制、其他和剪切这三个键。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. I see a long list.
turns.zh: 好了。看到一长串。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. End every work that is not marked 'system'.
turns.zh: 很好。结束所有没有标‘系统’的程序。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One by one? That will take time.
turns.zh: 一个一个来？那要花时间了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, but it is safe. I will keep here.
turns.zh: 对，但很安全。我呆在这儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All done. Have a go now?
turns.zh: 都完成了。现在试试吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, give it two quick touches.
turns.zh: 对，快速点两下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is asking if I would like to open it safe.
turns.zh: 它问我要不要以安全方式打开。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Say yes. That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 选是。这是好迹象。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It is open now. All my words are there.
turns.zh: 好了。打开了。我写的内容都在。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Now make a copy of it.
turns.zh: 太好了。现在把它复制一份。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Where do I put the copy?
turns.zh: 复制到哪儿？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A different place, like your table top.
turns.zh: 另一个地方，比如桌面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I have done that. What now?
turns.zh: 好的，弄好了。然后呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let the machine have a quick look for errors.
turns.zh: 让机器快速查看一下错误。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How do I do that?
turns.zh: 怎么操作？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go to this box, right touch on your first store.
turns.zh: 进入‘此箱’，右键点主存储。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see 'properties'. Is that it?
turns.zh: 看到‘属性’。是这个吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, then go to 'box' and have a look.
turns.zh: 对，然后点‘工具箱’，运行检查。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says 'see now'. Do I put my finger on it?
turns.zh: 它写着‘现在查看’。我按它吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and put a mark in every box.
turns.zh: 是的，每个框都打上勾。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It says it will do it when I start again.
turns.zh: 好了。它说下次启动时执行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Let the machine do its work.
turns.zh: 没问题。让机器做它的工作。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, what now?
turns.zh: 好，现在呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Shut down again, then turn it on.
turns.zh: 再关机，然后开机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that now.
turns.zh: 我现在就做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. What do you see?
turns.zh: 好。你看到什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is starting up, same as before.
turns.zh: 它在启动，跟之前一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now go back to your papers.
turns.zh: 现在再去看你的文件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am there. It is still not opening.
turns.zh: 我到了。还是打不开。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give it a right touch.
turns.zh: 右键点它试试。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I get a list with 'open with'.
turns.zh: 出来一个列表，有‘打开方式’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take the first on the list.
turns.zh: 选列表里第一个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I did that. It says 'locked'.
turns.zh: 我点了。它说‘被锁’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, that is why. Let us let it go.
turns.zh: 对了，这就是原因。我们放开它。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, how do I do that?
turns.zh: 我怎么做？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open the list of running works. Stop that one.
turns.zh: 打开运行中的工作列表。停止那个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a list of work. Which one?
turns.zh: 我看到一堆工作。哪一个？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Look for the one with your name on it.
turns.zh: 找跟你名字一样的那个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it. I will end it now.
turns.zh: 看到了。我现在结束它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now see if you can make the thing open again.
turns.zh: 好。现在看看你能不能让它再打开。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is opening! Yes, it works now.
turns.zh: 它在打开了！好了，现在能用了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Keep a copy to be safe.
turns.zh: 太好了。留一份副本以防万一。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, i will do that now.
turns.zh: 我这就去办。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. After that, give it a full power off and on.
turns.zh: 好。之后，彻底关机再开机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I am turning it off now.
turns.zh: 好的。我现在关机。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give it a minute before you start it again.
turns.zh: 等一分钟再重新开机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be here. It is starting now.
turns.zh: 我等一下。现在开机了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now open it again.
turns.zh: 现在再打开它。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is opening. No error this time.
turns.zh: 它在打开。这次没有报错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is the inside all there?
turns.zh: 里面的内容都在吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, everything is here. It is all good.
turns.zh: 在，都在。没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done. Now make a copy to another place.
turns.zh: 做得好。现在复制一份到别处。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am doing that now. Where do I put it?
turns.zh: 我现在就复制。放哪里？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put it on the table or another place.
turns.zh: 放桌面或者另一个地方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It is on the table now.
turns.zh: 好了。现在桌面上有一份了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now see if the hard box is all right.
turns.zh: 好的。现在看看硬盘有没有问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How do I do that, okay.
turns.zh: 这要怎么做？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go to 'This Box', put the button on the store, and take 'Details'.
turns.zh: 打开‘此电脑’，右键点击硬盘，选择‘属性’。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am here. What now?
turns.zh: 我到了。现在呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go to the list of things for work and put a mark at 'Test'. Let it do its work.
turns.zh: 去工作用品列表，在‘测试’处做个标记。让它运行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is running now. No errors came up.
turns.zh: 正在运行。没有发现错误。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Then your machine is all right. You are good to go.
turns.zh: 太好了。那你的电脑没问题了。你可以放心用了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you like me to make a copy of the paper now?
turns.zh: 你要我现在复制一份文件吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, put it on another store or send it to your net space.
turns.zh: 是的，放到另一个盘或者传到你的网盘里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will do that. What about the sharp bits?
turns.zh: 好，我照做。那辣的东西呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep it soft for the food, but the machine is all right.
turns.zh: 菜要清淡，但电脑没问题了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. So the trouble is over?
turns.zh: 明白了。所以问题解决了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, a lock in the system made the error. Starting again put it right.
turns.zh: 是的，系统锁导致了错误。重启解决了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a weight off my mind. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 这下我放心了。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not at all. If it goes wrong again, give us a ring.
turns.zh: 不客气。如果再出问题，给我们打电话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 我会的。祝你今天愉快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. sure.
turns.zh: 你也是。好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that now, okay.
turns.zh: 我这就去做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Say if it is all right.
turns.zh: 好的。如果没问题了告诉我一声。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The paper is open and all there.
turns.zh: 文件打开了，内容都在。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Make a copy to be safe.
turns.zh: 那就好。做个备份以防万一。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it on the cloud as well.
turns.zh: 我也会存到云盘里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Wise. Then you are ready.
turns.zh: 明智之举。那你就准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for your time and help.
turns.zh: 谢谢你花时间帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is my work. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 这是我的工作。祝你今天愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, you too. sure.
turns.zh: 你也是。再会。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good day.
turns.zh: 再见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, well, i will do that now.
turns.zh: 我这就做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let me say if it goes well.
turns.zh: 好的。如果顺利就告诉我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The round thing is all right. No errors.
turns.zh: 那个圆盘没问题。没有错误。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good sign. Your machine is good.
turns.zh: 这是个好兆头。你的机器没问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a copy on the cloud now.
turns.zh: 我现在在云盘里存了一份。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you are ready for your meeting.
turns.zh: 那你就为会议做好准备了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I am ready. Thank you again.
turns.zh: 是的，我准备好了。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Any time.
turns.zh: 不客气。随时找我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep your number near.
turns.zh: 我会把你的号码放在手边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 好的。祝你今天愉快。

storyBlurb: 重要文件在电脑里打不开，下午就要交，急得团团转。一通电话，技术支持远程指导，重启后问题迎刃而解。
storyScript:
【开场·报修求助】周四上午十点，甲盯着电脑屏幕，冷汗直冒。他双击那份下午汇报要用的文件，系统却弹出错误提示，说无法访问。试了几次都一样，他赶紧拿起电话打给技术支持。电话那头传来乙沉稳的声音，甲语速飞快地描述了故障：文件打不开，提示错误代码，其他程序正常。乙安慰他别急，先确认文件路径和格式，甲一一照做，但问题依旧。乙说，可能是系统缓存冲突，需要重启电脑。甲犹豫了，怕重启后文件更打不开。乙耐心解释，重启是标准排查步骤，不会损坏文件。甲深吸一口气，按下了重启键。

【进行·逐步排查】电脑重新启动，甲紧张地盯着屏幕。乙在电话里指导他，重启后先不要打开任何程序，直接去文件所在位置。甲照做，发现文件图标正常，但双击后还是报错。乙让他打开任务管理器，结束所有非系统进程，再试。甲找到进程列表，一个个结束可疑项，手有些发抖。乙的声音始终平稳，像定心丸。结束后，甲再次双击文件，这次系统弹出对话框，询问是否以安全模式打开。乙说，选择是，可能是上次非正常关闭导致的锁定。甲点击确认，文件终于缓缓打开，内容完好无损。甲长舒一口气，额头渗出细汗。

【收束·恢复使用】乙让甲保存文件副本，并运行一次磁盘检查，确保没有坏道。甲一一执行，电脑运行流畅如初。他连声道谢，乙笑着说，下次遇到类似问题，先重启试试。甲挂断电话，看着屏幕上完整的文件，心里踏实了。他赶紧备份一份到云盘，然后继续准备下午的汇报。窗外阳光正好，办公室的咖啡机咕噜作响，一切恢复正常。甲心想，技术支持真是及时雨，不然今天可要抓瞎了。
